name: Master Storyteller
official_rules_text: As a Card action, a unit with the Master Storyteller keyword may choose up to X allied unit units within 2, where X is the current Round number. Each chosen unit gains 2 Surge tokens.
description: As a Card action, a unit with the Master Storyteller keyword may choose up to X allied unit units within 2, where X is the current Round number. Each chosen unit gains 2 Surge tokens.
